overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing a rainy night walk through a neon-lit urban downtown. The player character moves from a semi-enclosed graffiti-covered seating area through open plazas and commercial streets filled with holographic advertisements, ending on an elevated walkway overlooking the city.

events.description: exiting the covered seating area into the open rain-exposed plaza

seated on illuminated bench in the corner

concrete benches with yellow neon underlighting
linear yellow LED strips along the base of walls and benches

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a semi-enclosed urban seating area with heavy rain visible beyond the shelter. Graffiti-covered concrete walls surround the space, illuminated by yellow neon strips running along the benches. Several NPCs sit on the benches as the player character walks toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with concrete architecture and holographic billboards

events.description: exiting covered area into open rain-exposed plaza with concrete stairs visible
turning slightly right toward the commercial corridor with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza, passing concrete structures and illuminated stairs while rain falls heavily

notable_agents.action: seated on bench wearing red outfit, looking at device

entered.detail: multi-level concrete staircase with integrated yellow lighting
large floating digital advertisements on distant buildings
futuristic purple automated vending booths with glowing interfaces

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the sheltered area, the scene opens into a wide rain-soaked plaza surrounded by futuristic architecture. Concrete stairs with integrated lighting rise on the right, while holographic billboards glow in the distance. The player walks across the wet concrete surface toward a commercial corridor.

events.description: crossing a pedestrian crosswalk with metal grate surface

agents.ego_description: walking through commercial corridor, passing purple vending machines and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera with glowing umbrella

entered.detail: tall pillars displaying rotating digital advertisements
wall-mounted sign reading NEW YOU GET AN UPGRADE in yellow neon
metal grate crosswalk with yellow tactile paving strips

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrower commercial corridor lined with purple vending machines and holographic advertising pillars. A large neon sign on the left wall reads NEW YOU GET AN UPGRADE. The player crosses a metal grate pedestrian crosswalk while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: restaurant district with outdoor seating and illuminated trees

events.description: passing outdoor food stalls with illuminated umbrellas and seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendors and outdoor cafes, following a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing yellow jacket with purple glowing umbrella
orange van driving past in the background

entered.detail: futuristic food kiosks with illuminated canopies and outdoor seating
trees wrapped in colorful decorative lights
glass-fronted building with neon interior lighting displaying merchandise

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a restaurant district with outdoor seating under illuminated umbrellas. Trees wrapped in colorful lights line the street. The player follows a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella past futuristic storefronts, while an orange van drives by in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with neon-lit stairs overlooking the city

events.description: ascending illuminated concrete stairs with cyan neon railings
reaching elevated plaza with pink-lit structures and city overlook

raised pedestrian platform with glass railings overlooking the street below
building entrance bathed in bright pink neon light

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a flight of concrete stairs illuminated by cyan neon strips on the glass railings. Reaching the top, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway with a pink-lit structure visible ahead. An NPC stands at the glass railing overlooking the rainy city below as holographic ads float overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban nook into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a rainy cyberpunk city. It begins within a semi-enclosed seating area defined by graffiti-covered walls and yellow neon strips, moving forward as the camera emerges from the shelter into a wide, rain-soaked plaza flanked by futuristic architecture and glowing billboards. The scene then narrows into a commercial corridor lined with purple vending machines and holographic pillars before opening up again into a restaurant district where colorful lights wrap around trees and pedestrians carry glowing umbrellas. As the camera continues forward, it ascends a flight of concrete stairs accented by cyan neon strips on the glass railings. Finally, the movement culminates on an elevated walkway, revealing a panoramic view of the rainy cityscape beneath floating holographic advertisements and a pink-lit structure.
